raw_consumer_statement:
XXXX XXXX ( merchant ) should have advised me during the intake that I did not qualify for filing a restraining order on the respondent. Instead, they pushed it through & the court felt that the respondents harassment did not meet their criteria to issue a restraining order. 
Other issues with XXXX, they didnt spend much time preparing with me ( XXXX short phone calls & no face to face meeting ). During the hearing she was told she was leading. There were issues Ive listed in the declaration but XXXX did not bring them up during the hearing. 
Afterwards, Ive contacted several law firms, and they all told me I didnt qualify for filing a restraining order. 
XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX declined my dispute.
